page_metadata.biotools__summary: SuperPose is a tool for superpositions of protein structures.  SuperPose generates sequence alignments, structure alignments, PDB coordinates and RMSD statistics, difference distance plots, and images of the superimposed molecules.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SuperPose is a tool for superpositions of protein structures.  SuperPose generates sequence alignments, structure alignments, PDB coordinates and RMSD statistics, difference distance plots, and images of the superimposed molecules.
